UpdateLoginProfile.password: User password; not displayed in responses
UpdateLoginProfile.needResetPassword: Whether the user is required to reset password on next login
UpdateLoginProfile.enabledLogin: Whether sub-user console login is allowed
UpdateLoginProfile.enabledLoginMfa: Whether binding a secondary authentication device is required
UpdateLoginProfile.loginMfaType: Secondary authentication type; options: PHONE - mobile number, TOTP - virtual MFA device
UpdateLoginProfile.thirdPartyType: Bound third-party login type; options: UUAP - intranet account, PASSPORT - Baidu account
UpdateLoginProfile.thirdPartyAccount: Bound third-party login account; when binding type is PASSPORT, can be mobile number, email, or account name
